---
title: "Elizabeth Small"
---

## Elizabeth Small

**Dates:** (b.1837/8)

### Description

pupil at Otterbourne School

### Biography

Marianne Small (b. 1839/40) and Elizabeth Small (b. 1837/8) were the daughters of John Small (b. 1797/8), of Allbrook, agricultural labourer.

### Letters

- Letter from October 29 [1849]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
